title: bridelia tomentosa var. glabrifolia
intro: Bridelia tomentosa var. glabrifolia, also known as the Bridelia or Tonga grape, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, Bridelia tomentosa var. glabrifolia has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Bridelia tomentosa var. glabrifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal medicine, and its extracts are also used in various pharmaceutical applications.
